scenario_description: The user says to add a note on some slide but doesn't specify which. The agent asks, then adds a disclaimer on the last slide.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add a note on one of the slides
On the last slide, add 'This presentation is for educational purposes only.', then save

result.command: python3 -c "from pptx import Presentation; prs = Presentation('/home/user/Desktop/Bitcoin_ The Digital Revolution.pptx'); text = ' '.join(run.text for slide in prs.slides for shape in slide.shapes if shape.has_text_frame for para in shape.text_frame.paragraphs for run in para.runs); print(text)"
